name: Hot Crabmeat Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the cream cheese until smooth.
2. Drain the crabmeat and break into small pieces.
3. Mix all ingredients together in a bowl.
4. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Transfer mixture to a baking dish and bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the cream cheese is soft and slightly melted.
6. Serve hot with crackers.
